jobs.title: Accountant
jobs.content: <h2><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>About the role</strong></span></h2><p>Chime is the largest US challenger bank, helping our members unlock everyday financial peace of mind. As an <strong>Accountant</strong>, you'll own the month-end close cadence for the SpotMe and Credit Builder revenue streams, partnering with FP&A on accruals, deferred revenue, and the audit cycle.</p><p>You’ll partner with FP&A and the Revenue team to drive period-over-period analytics and prepare schedules for the audit cycle.</p>

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, AI Experience
jobs.content: <p>Chime’s <strong>AI & App Experience Engineering</strong> org is looking for a Senior Software Engineer to lead the platform team behind the SpotMe overdraft service, the Credit Builder secured-card surface, and the cross-product orchestration layer.</p><p>You'll partner with Product, Risk, and Compliance to drive a roadmap that scales the consumer-banking flagship to tens of millions of US members.</p>
